stemHtml: You are carrying medical supplies and personnel to a conflict zone for the government. To ensure priority with ATS, what message should you use?

options.a: Only registered ambulance aircraft get priority; state your registration.
options.b: After PAN PAN three times, state call sign, medical cargo, position, and intentions.
options.c: State call sign, position, level, heading, frequencies, and SSR code.
options.d: After PAN PAN three times plus "MEDICAL", state call sign, position, level, heading, frequencies monitored and SSR code.
